_publications._publicationTitle: Exploiting mitochondrial and metabolic homeostasis as a vulnerability in NF1 deficient cells.

_contextSnippet: Treatment of U87-MG cells with Y100 induced the formation of polarized mitochondrial hotspots...Mitochondrial puncta are first observable at 8 hours of Y100 treatment
details: Caused formation of polarized mitochondrial hotspots and loss of mitochondrial heat shock chaperone protein Tid1, with hotspots first observable at 8 hours of treatment
